notes: Large-capacity commercial/large-tent humidifier. No model number code found; marketed simply as '16L Cool Mist Humidifier Ultrasonic'. 4 mist levels, max 1400 ml/h; min output unconfirmed (manufacturer states 22H max runtime implying ~727 ml/h min, but not explicitly documented). 12h timer in 1h increments. Humidity setpoint 35–95% in 5% increments. 700 sq ft coverage area. Designed for 4×4 to 4×8 ft tents (120–240 cm). 4 extendable hoses included. Temp/humidity probe included. No built-in smart features; can be outlet-controlled by any grow controller/smart plug. US MSRP $155.99 (sale) / $179.99 (regular); EUR price unconfirmed.
